title: arcanature
body:
chill and magical modpack with enhanced visuals, biomes, mobs, and more.

_farmer's delight_ improves your cooking and farming experience. 

_naturalist_, _faunify_, and _critters & companions_ liven the world with adorable little creatures.

there are many quality of life mods such as _no crop trampling_, _item highlighter_, and _tree chop_.

_cluttered_ and _another furniture_ provide many decoration options.

_chipped_ and _chisel & bits_ are good for building with more detail.
